calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd L. Butler. Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. represented the Plaintiff, Gary Young and Defendant, Dhruva Banerjee appeared in pro per. The matter settled per stipulation of the parties and read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
